rulings.Case Title: PAUL BRUMETT VS. GEORGIA PACIFIC CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Defendant The W.W. Henry Companys Motion To Bifurcate Trial On The Issue Of Medical Causation
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 28, 2015 in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant The W.W. Henry Company's motion to bifurcate trial on the issue of medical causation: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:45a.m. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)
